prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021年理科最低位次约11927名，2023年约18754名，2024年物理类约18032名，2025年约22223名；整体呈持续后移趋势，近3年累计后移约10296名，2025年基准 约22223名；本省理科/物理类计划2021年71人、2023年74人、2024年78人、2025年79人，逐年小幅扩招；2026年计划89人，较2025年扩招约12.7%，扩招 幅度明显，竞争有所加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第83名，近年排名稳定在74-85区间，属全国中上游水平；2024年声誉偏负面（陕西文科断档事件）；2026年声誉偏负面（师德师风相关舆情）；抖音热度排名第51位，评价为较热，短视频平台有一定关注度；风景园林 学为A+学科，全国顶尖；林学、林业工程等传统优势学科实力突出，对相关专业报考有吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热 度持续偏高，但北京林业大学以农林为特色，工科专业热度受限于学校定位；本省2026年高考总人数约474900人，较2025年略有增加，物理类估算约268000人，竞争略有加剧；20 25年物理类本科批省控线429分，较2024年下降19分，反映试卷难度或整体竞争格局变化；学校位于北京，对江西省考生有一定跨省吸引力；该校在江西省招生 计划占比较小，属外省招生典型规模。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年物理类扩招约12.7%导致竞争加剧、本省考生规模小幅增加及省控线下降反映的竞争 格局变化，在2025年基准22223名基础上预计位次进一步后移；预测最低位次约23961名，区间23461-24461名。

- 电气工程及其自动化

- 自动化。

- 机械设计制造及其自动化

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间23461-24461名内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向（风景园林、机械类、林学类、统计学等），一档专业（计算机类、电气类、电子信息类）作为冲刺，三档专业（ 林业工程类、工商管理类、土木类）作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限时可重点冲刺一档热门工科专业；位次接近区间上限时建议以二档中与学校特色契合的专业为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2021, the minimum ranking for science was approximately 11927, in 2023 about 18754, in 2024 for physics category about 18032, and in 2025 about 22223; overall, there is a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 10296 in the past 3 years, and a baseline of about 22223 in 2025; the provincial science/physics category enrollment plan was 71 in 2021, 74 in 2023, 78 in 2024, and 79 in 2025, with a slight annual expansion; the 2026 plan is 89, an expansion of about 12.7% compared to 2025, with a significant expansion rate and intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; in 2026, the Soft Science Chinese University Ranking is about 83rd, with a stable ranking in the 74-85 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level nationwide; in 2024, reputation was negative (Shaanxi liberal arts cutoff incident); in 2026, reputation was negative (teacher ethics related public opinion); Douyin popularity ranking 51st, rated as relatively hot, with a certain level of attention on short video platforms; Landscape Architecture is an A+ discipline, top in the country; traditional advantageous disciplines such as Forestry and Forestry Engineering have strong strength, attracting applicants for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity, but Beijing Forestry University is characterized by agriculture and forestry, so the popularity of engineering majors is limited by the school's positioning; the total number of candidates for the 2026 college entrance examination in the province is about 474,900, a slight increase from 2025, with an estimated 268,000 in the physics category, leading to slightly intensified competition; the 2025 physics category undergraduate batch provincial control line is 429 points, a decrease of 19 points from 2024, reflecting changes in exam difficulty or overall competition pattern; the school is located in Beijing, which has a certain cross-provincial appeal to Jiangxi candidates; the enrollment plan for this school in Jiangxi Province is relatively small, typical of out-of-province enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, intensified competition due to a 12.7% expansion in the physics category in 2026, a slight increase in the number of candidates in the province, and changes in the competition pattern reflected by the drop in the provincial control line, based on the 2025 baseline of 22223, the ranking is expected to shift further backward; the predicted minimum ranking is about 23961, with a range of 23461-24461.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Digital Media Technology, Data Science and Big Data Technology)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Electronic Information Science and Technology
- Automation.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Landscape Architecture (including Liangxi Experimental Class)
- Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation
- Vehicle Engineering
- Statistics
- Forestry (including Liangxi Experimental Class)
- Finance.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Business Administration (Accounting, Business Administration, Human Resource Management, Property Management)
- Forestry Engineering (including Liangxi Experimental Class)
- Civil Engineering
- Environmental Engineering
- Food Science and Engineering
- Business English.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 23461-24461, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Landscape Architecture, Mechanical, Forestry, Statistics, etc.), use Tier 1 majors (Computer, Electrical, Electronic Information) as a reach, and Tier 3 majors (Forestry Engineering, Business Administration, Civil Engineering) as safety. When the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range, focus on reaching for popular Tier 1 engineering majors; when the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range, it is recommended to prioritize Tier 2 majors that align with the school's characteristics.
